summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new Mapbox address autocomplete feature in EV Trip Planner. All autocomplete functionality working correctly including dropdown behavior, keyboard navigation, suggestion selection, and full trip flow integration.
passed_tests: Autocomplete dropdown appears only when typing 2+ characters (correct behavior)
Autocomplete dropdown appears for both start and destination inputs
Suggestions have correct data-testid attributes (start-location-input-suggestions, start-location-input-suggestion-0, etc.)
Keyboard navigation works correctly (ArrowDown, ArrowUp, Enter, Escape)
Enter key selects highlighted suggestion and fills input
Click selection on suggestions works correctly
Loading indicator displays during API calls
Invalid/empty location queries handled correctly (no dropdown)
Suggestion structure correct (map pin icon, short name, full name)
Full trip flow works with autocomplete selections
Trip calculation successful with autocomplete-selected locations
Mapbox Geocoding API integration working correctly
AddressAutocomplete component properly integrated into TripForm
All required data-testid attributes present and functional

success_percentage.integration: 100% (Mapbox API and trip calculation integration working perfectly)
